case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF VS. FRANCES HASANAH SAMAEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,994.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAEL, FRANCES HASANAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF'S REPRESENTATIVE JOSEPH QUARTELL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAEL, FRANCES HASANAH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMAEL, FRANCES HASANAH $2,994.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,024.50, THE DEFENDANT'S ACTS CONSTITUTE FRAUDULENT CONDUCT UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTIONS 1709 AND 1710, BASED ON THE FINDINGS OF INTENTIONAL PROGRAM VIOLATIONS AT THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $585.15 ACCRUED INTEREST, $85.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAEL, FRANCES HASANAH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.
